flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Eastern Michigan University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (12.3k → 10.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Eastern Michigan University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
